task_description: Phase 84: Make the whole system deployable. Today ONLY ws-gateway ships: it is the sole service with a Dockerfile, the only workload in Helm (infra/helm/quant-platform/values.yaml), and the only entry in the CI docker matrix and deploy workflows (SERVICES="ws-gateway"). 12 of 13 app backends and 7 of 8 services have no container, no Helm workload, and no CI deploy; docker-compose.*.yml define only backing infra (postgres/redis/minio/kafka/livekit) with zero application containers. Add Dockerfiles, Helm charts, CI build+deploy, and compose app services so the platform can be stood up end-to-end.
